item.title: Wellness Influencer Dies One Day After 8th Wedding Anniversary Following Complications from IVF Procedure
item.description: Gabriela Martins Santos de Moura was reportedly in a coma for eight days before she died at age 31

item.title: All About Jonathan Bailey and Simone Ashley's “Bridgerton” Return and Why They Weren't in Season 4 Part 1 (Exclusive)
item.description: Showrunner Jess Brownell breaks down their cameo (and part 1 absence) in a new interview

item.title: Flavor Flav Vows to Throw Parade for U.S. Women’s Hockey Team After Inviting Them to ‘Real Celebration’ for Olympics Victory
item.description: The rapper and women's sports hype man expanded his Las Vegas party plans for U.S. athletes

item.title: JoJo Siwa Speaks Out About Why She Wasn't Invited to Fellow “Dance Moms” Alum Brooke Hyland's Wedding
item.description: Hyland tied the knot with Brian Thalman on Feb. 21, in Fort Myers, Florida

item.title: Liza Minnelli on Addiction and 'Amazing' Life in Sobriety: ‘Somebody Said Try This — and So I Tried It’ (Exclusive)
item.description: "If I fell off the program ... I'd go right back in and fight again. Don't give up," the stage and screen icon says in an exclusive interview with PEO...
